entries.claim_text: SkillOpt-Lite: Better and Faster Agent Self-evolution via One Line of Vibe
entries.quoted_snippet: SkillOpt-Lite: Better and Faster Agent Self-evolution via One Line of Vibe

entries.claim_text: arXiv (preprint)
entries.quoted_snippet: arxiv.org/abs/2607.03451
July, 2026

entries.claim_text: Yifei Shen, Bo Li, Xinjie Zhang
entries.quoted_snippet: Yifei Shen

entries.claim_text: https://github.com/EvolvingLMMs-Lab/SkillOpt-Lite
entries.quoted_snippet: https://github.com/EvolvingLMMs-Lab/SkillOpt-Lite

entries.claim_text: tech-report
entries.quoted_snippet: microsoft-tech-report

entries.claim_text: 一個 LLM agent 的實戰能力不只來自底層模型
entries.quoted_snippet: an agent's real-world capability is determined not solely by its base Large Language Model

entries.claim_text: f(s) = \mathbb{E}_{z \sim \mathcal{D}}
entries.quoted_snippet: f(s) = \mathbb{E}_{z \sim \mathcal{D}}[R(H(M, z, s))]

entries.claim_text: 無法解析求得
entries.quoted_snippet: the gradient $\nabla_s f$ is analytically intractable

entries.claim_text: 把近年各家 skill-optimization 方法逐一映射回古典零階優化算子
entries.quoted_snippet: existing heuristics utilize components analogous to the classical ZO toolbox

entries.claim_text: batch $B_m{=}8$
entries.quoted_snippet: Iterative reflection mini-batching with size $B_m=8$

entries.claim_text: 技能優化其實比較像
entries.quoted_snippet: classical ZO relies on blind numerical perturbations

entries.claim_text: 論文用演算法穩定度（Expected On-Average Stability）給出泛化誤差界
entries.quoted_snippet: this generalization gap can be tightly bounded via the lens of Expected On-Average Stability

entries.claim_text: \epsilon(\mathcal{S}) \le \hat{\epsilon}_D(\mathcal{S})
entries.quoted_snippet: \epsilon(\mathcal{S}) \le \hat{\epsilon}_D(\mathcal{S})

entries.claim_text: 就會膨脹、泛化崩潰
entries.quoted_snippet: the stability coefficient $\beta_{\exp}$ increases, leading to generalization collapse

entries.claim_text: 一旦引入與訓練集嚴格不相交的驗證集
entries.quoted_snippet: once a disjoint validation set is introduced, the stability coefficient $\beta_{\exp}$ is completely removed

entries.claim_text: \epsilon(\mathcal{S}_{\text{val}}) \le \hat{\epsilon}_{\text{val}}
entries.quoted_snippet: \epsilon(\mathcal{S}_{\text{val}}) \le \hat{\epsilon}_{\text{val}}(\mathcal{S}_{\text{val}})

entries.claim_text: 論文順帶批評，Reflexion 完全沒有動態驗證
entries.quoted_snippet: compromise the validation bound by executing their gates

entries.claim_text: 在 LiveMath 與 DocVQA 上，竟然贏過跑滿 4 個 epoch 的完整 SkillOpt
entries.quoted_snippet: single-batch unvalidated agent configuration outperformed the baseline SkillOpt framework even after the latter underwent four full epochs

entries.claim_text: 但在 Spreadsheet 上反而掉到初始基準以下
entries.quoted_snippet: on the Spreadsheet benchmark, the optimized skill degraded below its initial baseline

entries.claim_text: SkillOpt-Lite 砍掉 mini-batch reflection pooling
entries.quoted_snippet: we remove complex batch-level merging, text-based learning rate scheduling, and historical rejected-edit buffers

entries.claim_text: 才覆寫 best_skill.md
entries.quoted_snippet: it permanently overwrites the production skill file on disk, designated as \texttt{best\_skill.md}

entries.claim_text: 開發者一行 slash command 即可觸發
entries.quoted_snippet: /skillopt-loop rounds=10 batchsize=40 target=gpt5.4-nano

entries.claim_text: 這就是論文所稱的「capability inversion（能力反轉）」
entries.quoted_snippet: outperforming the much larger \texttt{GPT5.5} model running under a basic harness

entries.claim_text: HarnessOpt 只改 harness（w.o. skill）就跳到 **0.7651**，技能與 harness 同時優化（w. skill）達 **0.7758**
entries.quoted_snippet: \textbf{HarnessOpt w. skill} & \textbf{0.7758}

entries.claim_text: 自動攔截並套用 `retry reasoning=low` 的 fallback 策略讓模型脫困
entries.quoted_snippet: applied a fallback policy (\texttt{retry reasoning=low})

entries.claim_text: 所有改動可 `git reset` 回滾並用環境變數 toggle 包起來
entries.quoted_snippet: All code edits are fully reversible via \texttt{git reset}

entries.claim_text: 驗證前先過編譯與 `N=5` 冒煙測試
entries.quoted_snippet: a compile check and an early smoke test ($N=5$)

entries.claim_text: 既有標準結果的套用
entries.quoted_snippet: a standard model selection bound over $m$ validation samples

entries.claim_text: 正式實驗卻**沒有跟其中任何一個直接比**
entries.quoted_snippet: We employ identical optimizer models for both SkillOpt and SkillOpt-Lite

entries.claim_text: 作者自己承認 LiveMath 與 OfficeQA「只有 10–20 個驗證樣本、驗證變異數很高」
entries.quoted_snippet: LiveMath and OfficeQA contain only 10 to 20 validation instances, resulting in high validation variance

entries.claim_text: 作者把 LiveMath 與 OfficeQA 的 train:val:test 從 `2:1:7` 改成 `2:2:6`
entries.quoted_snippet: we adjust the train-validation-test split for these two benchmarks from $2:1:7$ to $2:2:6$

entries.claim_text: 論文自稱遵循 SkillOpt 既有評測協定，且兩種方法共用相同 optimizer 設定與同一調整後切分，故改切分是偏離其宣稱對齊的舊協定，而非表內兩側各跑一套切分
entries.quoted_snippet: Our experimental configuration follows the evaluation protocols established in SkillOpt

entries.claim_text: GPT-4o 的 LiveMath 從初始 25.9 被 SkillOpt-Lite 拉到 58.8（+32.9），此增益來源更像切分改動或答案抽取修正而非技能本身
entries.quoted_snippet: \textbf{58.8}\gain{32.9}

entries.claim_text: 一旦條件對齊——兩者都上 HarnessOpt——GPT-5.5 是 0.8577，仍穩穩高於 nano 的 0.7758
entries.quoted_snippet: \textbf{HarnessOpt w. skill} & \textbf{0.7758} & \textbf{0.8256} & \textbf{0.8505} & \textbf{0.8577}

entries.claim_text: 卻沒有記錄任何一個模型的 snapshot 或版本日期；優化器 GitHub Copilot 也只給了名稱，沒有版本、設定或呼叫參數
entries.quoted_snippet: We employ identical optimizer models for both SkillOpt and SkillOpt-Lite, with GitHub Copilot deployed as the baseline coding agent.

entries.claim_text: 對具體分數（尤其 LiveMath 的巨幅跳升與 capability inversion）保留懷疑
entries.quoted_snippet: single-batch unvalidated agent configuration outperformed the baseline SkillOpt framework even after the latter underwent four full epochs

entries.claim_text: 圖 1a 宏觀能力雷達圖：SkillOpt-Lite（藍）在多數軸向包住 SkillOpt（紅），SearchQA 兩者幾乎並列
entries.quoted_snippet: The radar plot illustrates the macro-level capability comparison averaged across all evaluated model scales

entries.claim_text: 圖 2 pilot：單批未驗證 Copilot 在 LiveMath/DocVQA 勝過 4-epoch SkillOpt，SpreadSheet 藍柱 15.3 低於初始 29.9
entries.quoted_snippet: Empirical evaluation of single-batch coding agent exploration versus multi-epoch skill optimization

entries.claim_text: 圖 3b SkillOpt-Lite 管線示意：軌跡各存成檔案，優化器讀檔改技能，經 Validation gate（Accept→S_{t+1}／Reject→edit-history log），已無 mini-batch pooling／slow-update damping／rejected-edit buffer
entries.quoted_snippet: eliminates mini-batch reflection pooling, slow update damping, and historical rejection buffers

entries.claim_text: 圖 4 收斂曲線：論文只主張 SkillOpt-Lite（藍方點）在最後一步等於或高於 SkillOpt（紅圓點），並在特定面板起步更陡；圖中 SearchQA-GPT-5.4 面板藍線 step 1–9 低於紅線僅 step 10 追平，故不支持全程逐步優勢。曲線呈粗大階梯狀、面板間 y 軸尺度差異大（僅取定性上下位序與階梯形狀，未逐一核對 y 軸刻度數值）
entries.quoted_snippet: SkillOpt-Lite consistently establishes an equal or elevated performance ceiling by the final optimization step
